name: lukas/preisliste
description: CSV price list export plugin for Shopware 6 storefront customers with login-protected download of product number, product name and customer-specific calculated sales channel prices.

description.de-DE: Erstellt für eingeloggte Shopware-6-Kunden eine CSV-Preisliste mit Artikelnummer, Produktname und dem im aktuellen Sales-Channel gültigen Kundenpreis.
description.en-GB: Creates a CSV price list for logged-in Shopware 6 customers with product number, product name and the customer-specific price valid in the current sales channel.
